chunks.title: Sons of David in Hebron and Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Lists the sons born to David in Hebron and Jerusalem, including their mothers.

chunks.title: Kings of Judah from Solomon to Jeconiah
chunks.reason: Traces the royal line from Solomon through Rehoboam to the exile under Jeconiah.

chunks.title: Descendants of Jeconiah Post-Exile
chunks.reason: Details the lineage from Jeconiah through Zerubbabel to later generations.
